slots.alt: Blueschist outcrop, Syros — blue-grey high-pressure rock with glaucophane.
Weathered granite grus, Mykonos — coarse permeable sand from disaggregated granite.
Marble karst, Naxos/Paros — white crystalline marble with dissolution features.
Schist regolith, Andros — foliated metamorphic rock and thin soil.
Pyroclastic tuff, Milos/Santorini — pale ash and pumice, hydrothermally altered.
Meltemi-whipped Aegean sea surface under NW wind.
